title: LENOR FABRIC CONDITIONER CHERRY BLOSSOM & ROSE WATER 42 WASHES 1386ML
description: Product description Lenor Fabric Conditioner Cherry Blossom & Rose Water 42 Washes 1386ml Ingredients <5% Cationic Surfactants, Perfumes, Benzyl Salicylate, Citronellol, Geraniol, Hexyl Cinnamal, Hydroxycitronellal, Linalool Directions Add 15ml (approximately 3 capfuls) to the rinse cycle dispenser of your washing machine for a standard load. For best results, use in the rinse cycle only. Do not use in the wash cycle. One 1386ml bottle is suitable for 42 washes. Manufacturer Contact Information Procter & Gamble UK, Weybridge, Surrey, KT13 0XP, UK See more
